retry_reason: release_firmware is a put operation; retrying would be a double-free.
contract_summary: This is a release wrapper for firmware data. It releases the reference held by fw->data by calling release_firmware, then NULLs out both data and filename pointers to prevent use-after-free. The caller must not access fw->data after calling this function. Typically called during driver teardown or when firmware is no longer needed.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release the firmware reference via release_firmware and clear the pointers; no other business logic.

check.reason: The function calls release_firmware(fw->data), which is a put on its first parameter (fw->data). The access path from b43_firmware_file parameter fw to the refcount field is fw.data.priv.ref.refcount, matching the callee's path after dereferencing fw->data. The type chain is consistent. All operations in the candidate are supported.
